description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade features a prominent staircase leading to a recessed entryway, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious terrace with a metal railing. The side and rear elevations are clad in light-colored brick, with additional terraces and outdoor spaces, including a green lawn area. The upper floor has multiple rooms with large windows, providing ample natural light and views. The house includes exterior staircases connecting the terrace and upper level, and the overall design emphasizes geometric lines and open spaces. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from brick, concrete, glass, and metal.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, brick and dark panel exteriors, and spacious terraces with metal railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, recessed entryway, large windows, and a terrace with metal railing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light brick facade, exterior staircase, terrace, and green lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace, exterior stairs, large glass doors, and extensive use of brick.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark panel walls, large windows, and the terrace extending from the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door accessed by a wide staircase, with no porch or overhang, and large glass panels.
